briefdescription.para: Find the indices of species (LEGACY - COMMENTED OUT)

detaileddescription.para: Find the species by name (LEGACY - COMMENTED OUT)
Get the concentration of a species (LEGACY - COMMENTED OUT)
get the concentration of a species given either the index or the name of the species

parameterdescription.para: The index of the species - Optional
The name of the species - Optional

detaileddescription.para: Get the concentration of a species by index (LEGACY - COMMENTED OUT)
Get the concentration of a species by name (LEGACY - COMMENTED OUT)
This procedure initializes a ChemStateType object with proper error handling and validation. It replaces the old allocation patterns with a cleaner approach.

parameterdescription.para: Maximum number of species to allocate for
Error manager for context and error reporting

briefdescription.para: Clean up and deallocate ChemStateType.
Validate ChemStateType for consistency.
Reset ChemStateType to initial values.
Check if required arrays are allocated.
Get approximate memory usage in bytes.
Print summary of ChemStateType.
Find species index by name.
Get species concentration by index.
Set species concentration by index.
Get a pointer to a vertical column for a given field name and (i,j) indices (type-safe)
Get the number of species in the chemical state.
Get species names array.
Get concentrations for all species at a grid point.
Set concentrations for all species at a grid point.
Get all concentrations as a full 4D array.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the complete concentration array for all species and grid points. This is useful for processes that need to work with the entire domain.

parameterdescription.para: Full 4D concentration array (nx, ny, nz, n_species)

briefdescription.para: Set all concentrations from a full 4D array.

detaileddescription.para: Updates the complete concentration arrays for all species and grid points. This is useful for processes that compute tendencies for the entire domain.

parameterdescription.para: Full 4D concentration array (nx, ny, nz, n_species)

briefdescription.para: Check if a species exists in the chemical state.
Get grid dimensions.
Initialize Mie data for aerosol optical properties.

detaileddescription.para: This subroutine allocates and initializes Mie scattering data based on the configuration file information and species Mie name mappings.

parameterdescription.para: Array of full file paths to Mie data files

briefdescription.para: Data type for managing the state of the chemical model.

detaileddescription.para:
chemStateType contains the following data members:
State
A character string containing the name of this state.
nSpecies
The total number of species.
nSpeciesGas
The number of gas species.
nSpeciesAero
The number of aerosol species.
nSpeciesDust
The number of dust species.
nSpeicesSeaSalt
The number of sea salt species.
SpeciesIndex
An array containing the total species index.
AeroIndex
An array containing the aerosol species index.
GasIndex
An array containing the gas species index.
DustIndex
An array containing the dust species index.
SeaSaltIndex
An array containing the sea salt species index.
chemSpecies
A 2-D array containing the concentration of each species.
